name: RABBIT-FILE-BACKLOG-3
title: Missing test: allocate_id concurrent race / retry-on-non-fast-forward
description: test-branch-ops.py covers single-threaded allocation but never exercises the concurrent-allocate failure mode (BUG-5/BUG-20 style). Add a test that spawns two concurrent allocate_id calls (subprocess.Popen pair or threading) against the same feature+type and asserts both succeed with distinct IDs. Tests for both the worktree race (BUG-18) and counter race (BUG-20) belong here.
